home.testimonial_text_1: Camping Loutsa made our family vacation unforgettable! The beachfront location, friendly staff, and modern facilities exceeded our expectations.
home.testimonial_text_2: Best camping experience in Greece! The nearby beaches are stunning, and the crew is incredibly helpful with local recommendations.
home.testimonial_text_3: We return every summer! The combination of natural beauty, comfortable amenities, and warm hospitality keeps us coming back.
home.testimonial_text_4: A perfect getaway spot! The peaceful atmosphere, clean facilities, and proximity to beautiful beaches made our stay absolutely memorable.
home.testimonial_text_5: Safe, welcoming, and full of character. The staff made me feel like family. I've already booked my return trip!
home.testimonial_text_6: Twenty years of memories at Camping Loutsa! The Oinousses islands view, fresh Mediterranean air, and genuine hospitality are incomparable.

about.title: About Camping Loutsa
about.description: Camping Loutsa is a family-run campsite with a heritage spanning nearly half a century. From a simple vineyard to an organized tourist destination, we've maintained our commitment to authentic Greek hospitality and natural beauty.
about.mission_text: Finikounda is a tourist fishing village of Messinia, part of the Pylos-Nestor municipality and located midway between Methoni and Koroni, 70 km from Kalamata. It has a permanent population of around 700 residents, a small and genuine community with authentic Greek character, family-friendly, in immediate proximity to nature and water activities.
about.why_location_desc: Located on one of the most beautiful and clean beaches of Finikounda gulf. Just 20 meters from pristine sandy beach awarded with Blue Flag for cleanliness. Eastern views of the historic Venetian Tower.
about.why_facilities_desc: 70 spacious 48m² pitches with electricity and water. Full facilities including 24/7 hot water showers, restaurant, café-bar, mini market, WiFi, laundry, and boat services.
about.why_experience_desc: Owned and operated by Nikolaos Tswnis and family for over 40 years. What started as spontaneous hospitality has evolved into professional service while maintaining genuine warmth.
about.why_community_desc: Experience where European travelers once discovered hidden paradise. The fence fell, access opened, and a community was born. That spirit lives on today.
about.story_intro: From a vineyard used by grandfather Panagiotis Tswnis's family, an idea was born around 1975. What followed is a story of authentic hospitality, community, and evolution.
about.story_detail_1: In 1980, Nikolaos Tswnis transformed the agricultural land into a welcoming retreat. Early German, Austrian, and Italian visitors found refuge here, pitching tents wherever the road led them. Gradually, a simple fence was removed, inviting wandering tourists to experience safety and comfort on private land with basic amenities—well water, fresh eggs, vegetables from the farm, then sanitary facilities and a kitchen.
about.story_detail_2: In 1990 the camping closed briefly for reorganization. In 1992, 'Camping Loutsa' officially reopened with proper urban planning approval and all the facilities and licenses of an organized tourist business. Today, under Nikolaos Tswnis and his family's stewardship, we blend modern professional service with the warmth and courtesy that defines authentic Greek hospitality.
about.timeline_1975_desc: Grandfather's vineyard land sparks the vision for a camping destination.
about.timeline_1980_desc: Nikolaos realizes the dream. Early travelers discover a place of refuge and warmth.
about.timeline_1990_desc: Closing for reorganization and improvement to meet growing demand.
about.timeline_1992_desc: Reopens as licensed 'Camping Loutsa' with full facilities and urban planning approval.
about.timeline_present_desc: Continuing the legacy of service, courtesy, and friendliness. Modern facilities preserving authentic values.
about.location_desc: Nestled in Finikounda, Messinia, on one of the most beautiful coastal stretches of the Peloponnese. Between Methoni and Koroni, just 70 km from Kalamata. Where the foothills meet the sea and history meets hospitality.
about.map_embed_note: Contact us for detailed directions and the best routes from your location

facilities.title: Amenities & Facilities

facilities.water_desc: 24/7 fresh water supply at all sites.
facilities.showers_desc: Clean shower facilities with hot water.
facilities.electricity_desc: Power connections available at each site.
facilities.wifi_desc: Free internet access throughout the grounds.

activities.title: Things To Do
activities.beaches_desc: Explore pristine beaches including Voidokilia, Kandouni, Marathi, and more.
activities.water_sports_desc: Swimming, snorkeling, and water activities at nearby beaches.
activities.hiking_desc: Scenic trails through the Messinian countryside with stunning views.
activities.cultural_desc: Visit Ancient Messene, Nestor's Palace, temples, and monasteries.
activities.towns_desc: Explore Pylos, Koroni, Methoni, Kalamata, and other traditional Greek villages.
activities.fishing_desc: Local fishing opportunities and seafood dining experiences.
activities.nature_desc: See loggerhead turtles nesting on the beach and experience local wildlife.

how_to_reach.title: How to Reach Us
how_to_reach.directions_text: Located in western Messinia near Finikounda village, opposite the Oinousses islands.
how_to_reach.from_athens: From Athens: Approximately 200 km southwest (2.5-3 hour drive)
how_to_reach.from_kalamata: From Kalamata: Approximately 50 km south (45 minutes drive)

rules.title: Campsite Rules & Regulations
rules.quiet_hours_desc: Keep noise to a minimum after 10 PM to respect other guests.
rules.pets_desc: Pets allowed with proper documentation and vaccination records.
rules.campfires_desc: Campfires permitted only in designated areas. Follow all fire safety guidelines.
rules.parking_desc: Park only in designated parking areas. Do not block roads or other sites.
rules.waste_desc: Dispose of waste in designated bins. Keep your site clean.
rules.safety_desc: Follow all safety guidelines and emergency procedures.
rules.respect_desc: Respect other guests and the natural environment.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a1: Check-in is at 2 PM and check-out is at 11 AM. Early check-in and late check-out may be available upon request.
faq.a2: Yes, a refundable deposit is required to secure your reservation.
faq.a3: Yes, pets are allowed with proper documentation and vaccination records.
faq.a4: Breakfast is not included, but we have a mini market with supplies. Our restaurant also serves breakfast.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept cards and cash. Card payments receive a 2% discount.
faq.a6: Campfires are permitted only in designated areas. Please follow all fire safety guidelines.
